name: One Socket
short_description: Charge the generator to power your devices, but be careful, you only have One Socket to work with. Make tough decisions to keep you safe from the monster in the dark while you solve the mysteries that will free you. Do you have what it takes to survive?
detailed_description:
Approximately 90 minutes of core gameplay + additional replayable custom difficulties

One Socket combines classic horror elements such as locked-in-place movement and limited resources with escape room mechanics to create a totally new and unique experience. Solve puzzles, avoid terrifying monsters, and uncover the secrets behind the mysterious experiment you have signed up for.

FEATURES

  • Spooky environment, sound effects, and jumpscares
  • Narrative based playthrough with discoverable lore
  • Two unique escape rooms
  • 8 randomized puzzles with difficulty levels Normal, Hard, and Extreme
  • 5 environments
  • Retro style point and click
  • Unique visual style
  • Fixed in place movement
  • Custom difficulty mode where you can test your skills within the escape room
